summary: Tested Pet Profile page enhancements: photo gallery with multiple photos support, social sharing via ShareablePetCard modal, badge/achievements display, and Dine page responsiveness. All 5 features tested and WORKING correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Profile page gallery and sharing features fully functional. Test pet Mojo (pet-99a708f1722a) has 2 photos in gallery. ShareablePetCard modal opens with style selection and Copy/Save/Share buttons. Dine page is responsive on both desktop and mobile.

feature_1_gallery_api_endpoints.details: All 4 gallery endpoints working: POST /api/pets/{pet_id}/gallery (upload), GET /api/pets/{pet_id}/gallery (list), DELETE /api/pets/{pet_id}/gallery/{photo_id} (delete), POST /api/pets/{pet_id}/gallery/{photo_id}/set-main (set main). 11 pytest tests passed including validation for non-existent pets/photos.

feature_2_photo_gallery_display.details: Pet Profile page shows 'Mojo's Photo Gallery' section with '2 photos with Mojo' count, Main Photo badge on primary photo, gallery grid with photos and empty 'Add' slots, and 'Add Photos' button for uploading new photos.

feature_3_share_profile_button.details: Share Profile button ('Share Mojo's Profile') opens ShareablePetCard modal with: pet card preview showing photo/name/breed/Pet Soul score/tier/Pet Pass number, 'Choose Style' with 5 color templates (purple/orange/blue/green/pink), 'Show stats on card' checkbox, Copy/Save/Share action buttons.

feature_4_achievements_badges.details: Pet Profile shows '4 Achievements' count in Soul Profile section. Achievement notification toast displayed: '🎉 Achievement Unlocked! 🐕 Allergy Aware - Added food allergy information' with confetti celebration animation.

feature_5_dine_page_responsive.details: Dine page tested on Desktop (1920x1080) and Mobile (390x844). Desktop: full navigation, 6-column service grid, 3-column experience cards. Mobile: hamburger menu, stacked CTA buttons, 2-column service grid, bottom navigation bar (HOME/SERVICES/ORDERS/MY PET).

verification_evidence.backend_tests: 11/11 pytest tests passed for gallery API endpoints
verification_evidence.gallery_display: Screenshot shows 'Mojo's Photo Gallery' with 2 photos, Main Photo badge, Add Photos button
verification_evidence.share_modal: Screenshot shows ShareablePetCard modal with pet card preview, style selection, and action buttons
verification_evidence.achievements: Screenshot shows achievement notification toast with confetti animation
verification_evidence.dine_responsive: Screenshots show proper layout on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports
